word: G4080 - πηλίκος - pēlíkos - pay-lee'-kos - How great

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πηλίκος

- Transliteration: Pelikos

- Phonetic: pay-lee'-kos

- Definition:

1. how great, how large

a. in a material reference (denoting geometrical magnitude as distinguished from arithmetical)

b. in an ethical sense: how distinguished

- Origin: a quantitative form (the feminine) of the base of G4225

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: A quantitative form (the feminine) of the base of G4225; how much (as indefinite) that is in size or (figuratively) dignity: - how great (large).
